changes.value: In markdown-display.tsx, `forwardRef` is imported on line 55, after the MarkdownDisplay function definition. While this compiles (hoisting), it breaks the convention of all imports at the top of the file and will confuse linters/readers. Move to the top import block.
markdown-display: forwardRef import after component definition
